title: Spot-scraper input
description: No required input. Optional override fields let you point the actor at a different commodity feed without redeploying.

feedUrl.title: Trading Economics feed URL
feedUrl.description: Override the default commodities feed URL.

symbolPattern.title: Symbol/name regex (case-insensitive)
symbolPattern.description: Regex used to find the EUA row inside the commodities feed. Default matches both 'Carbon' and 'EUA'.
